title: U.S. launches fresh wave of strikes on Iran, as analysts warn conflict risks becoming 'forever war'
summary_full: Fighting in the Middle East has intensified in recent days, but could escalate further if Iran fails to cooperate, President Donald Trump said.
summary_public: Fighting in the Middle East has intensified in recent days, but could escalate further if Iran fails to cooperate, President Donald Trump said.
